tier_rationale: Largest volume market in local service businesses. PGP (Pressure / Grass / Paint style) profile. Low churn once onboarded — they trust long-term relationships. High referral coefficient within local networks.
tagline: A local service business owner who's great at their trade but terrible at marketing and admin.

psychographics.self_identity: I'm a craftsman who happens to run a business.
psychographics.fear: A bad review tanking the business or a slow season lasting too long.
psychographics.ambition: Book the calendar out 3 weeks, pay the crew on time, buy another truck.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Getting outmarketed by slicker, less-skilled competitors.

pain_points.pain: Great at the job, terrible at marketing
Leads come in but no one follows up fast enough
Reviews are inconsistent, don't know how to ask
Scheduling chaos — double books and no-shows

desired_outcomes.outcome: Booked out 3 weeks ahead, every week
No missed leads — every call or form followed up in under 5 minutes
Crew paid on time, cash reserves built

buying_triggers.trigger: Just lost a job to a competitor because they responded faster
Got a 1-star review and didn't know how to respond
Slow month hit and no pipeline to fall back on
Saw another local shop booked solid

objections.counter_angle: Runs on text message and email — nothing to log into daily.

objections.objection: I tried a marketing agency and it didn't work
objections.counter_angle: This isn't an agency — it's a system you own. Results show up in booked jobs, not reports.

objections.objection: Too expensive for a small shop
objections.counter_angle: One extra booked job per month covers it. Show the math.

objections.objection: I don't have time to learn something new
objections.counter_angle: Setup in 45 minutes. It works while you work.

communication_preferences.tone: Conversational, plain English, no jargon, results-focused
communication_preferences.length: Short emails (100-200 words); text messages; short videos
communication_preferences.vocabulary: Jobs, leads, calls, reviews, schedule, booked, crew, trucks
communication_preferences.proof_type: Photos, dollar amounts, booked calendar screenshots

conversion_path.awareness: Facebook or Google post — before/after photo + booked-calendar proof
conversion_path.interest: Free 'lead response scorecard' — how fast are you really responding?
conversion_path.retention: Weekly SMS of booked jobs + monthly review call
